message:
feat(windows): cherry-pick Windows platform support from PR #3268 (#3387)

Cherry-picks the Windows platform support work from costin-eseanu's PR #3268,
with the following fixes applied:

- Fix SIGTERM→SIGKILL regression: use platform-specific gracefulTerminate()
  in doltserver instead of process.Kill() (preserves graceful Dolt shutdown)
- Fix HasSession error swallowing: restore proper error discrimination on Unix,
  fall back to catch-all only on Windows where psmux lacks error strings
- Fix import cycle: config→util→lock→tmux→config broken by inlining
  SetProcessGroup in lock and removing util import from config/overseer.go
- Fix Cancel/CommandContext mismatch: new callsites use SetDetachedProcessGroup
  (no Cancel hook) since they use exec.Command, not exec.CommandContext
- Add descendants_stub.go for non-Windows compilation of Toolhelp32 API
- Move processIsAlive to platform files in doltserver (was using runtime.GOOS
  with Windows-only syscall.OpenProcess)

Excluded from cherry-pick:
- .beads/backup/*.jsonl (contributor's local data, not production
- .copilot/ docs and .github/hooks/ (separate concern)
- Formula TOML changes (separate concern)
- .gitignore updates (separate concern)



EOF
)

Co-authored-by: costin-eseanu <costin.eseanu@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
